Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EclairMap

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EclairMap
public class EclairMap extends Object

Java class for EclairMap complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EclairMap">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="boundingBoxBottom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="boundingBoxLeft" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="boundingBoxRight" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="boundingBoxTop" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mapLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mapName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="projection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
